content:
When you speak in a meeting, people decide in seconds whether to follow you. This intensive focuses on the language and delivery that carry authority across cultures, without sounding scripted or rehearsed.

## What you'll learn
- Opening a meeting so the room aligns immediately: no preamble, no warm-up
- Framing recommendations with executive clarity, not hedging language
- Handling interruptions and pushback with composure and precision
- Closing with clear, owned next steps that stick after the call ends

## Who it's for
Senior managers and directors who already work in English daily and want more presence in high-stakes rooms: board presentations, partner reviews, cross-border steering committees.
title: Executive Presence in English Meetings
